title: Anthropic Files For An IPO: Rapid Reaction — With M.G. Siegler
summary: Anthropic has filed for an IPO. M.G. Siegler discusses why this move matters, including Anthropic's race to go public before OpenAI and the current capabilities of Claude. The segment analyzes whether Anthropic needs the capital.
